description_fr: Madonna, Beyoncé, Taylor Swift, Rihanna, Lady Gaga. Les reines de la pop.
description_en: Madonna, Beyoncé, Taylor Swift, Rihanna, Lady Gaga. The queens of pop.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le vrai nom de Lady Gaga ?
questions.question_en: What is Lady Gaga's real name?
questions.explanation_fr: Stefani Joanne Angelina Germanotta, née en 1986 à New York.
questions.explanation_en: Stefani Joanne Angelina Germanotta, born 1986 in New York.

questions.question_fr: Combien de Grammy Awards Beyoncé a-t-elle remportés (record absolu) ?
questions.question_en: How many Grammys has Beyoncé won (absolute record)?
questions.explanation_fr: Beyoncé a 32 Grammys (en 2024), record absolu pour un artiste solo.
questions.explanation_en: Beyoncé has 32 Grammys (as of 2024), absolute record for a solo artist.

questions.question_fr: Madonna est surnommée la 'Reine de la Pop'.
questions.question_en: Madonna is nicknamed the 'Queen of Pop'.
questions.explanation_fr: Madonna détient ce titre depuis les années 80. Elle est la femme la plus vendue de l'histoire.
questions.explanation_en: Madonna has held this title since the 80s. She's the best-selling female artist in history.

questions.question_fr: Quel hit de Taylor Swift parle d'une rupture en 22 ans ?
questions.question_en: Which Taylor Swift hit talks about being 22?
questions.explanation_fr: '22' est un hit de l'album Red (2012).
questions.explanation_en: '22' is a hit from the Red album (2012).

questions.question_fr: Rihanna est originaire de quelle île ?
questions.explanation_fr: Robyn Rihanna Fenty est née en 1988 à Saint Michael, Barbade.
questions.explanation_en: Robyn Rihanna Fenty was born in 1988 in Saint Michael, Barbados.

questions.question_fr: L'autre nom de Beyoncé sur scène est ___ Fierce.
questions.question_en: Beyoncé's stage alter ego is ___ Fierce.
questions.explanation_fr: Sasha Fierce était l'alter ego scénique de Beyoncé jusqu'en 2010.
questions.explanation_en: Sasha Fierce was Beyoncé's stage alter ego until 2010.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le titre du premier single de Britney Spears (1998) ?
questions.question_en: What was Britney Spears's first single (1998)?
questions.explanation_fr: '...Baby One More Time' est sorti en 1998, Britney avait 16 ans.
questions.explanation_en: '...Baby One More Time' was released in 1998, Britney was 16.

questions.explanation_fr: Adele Laurie Blue Adkins est née en 1988 à Tottenham, Londres.
questions.explanation_en: Adele Laurie Blue Adkins was born in 1988 in Tottenham, London.

questions.question_fr: Quel album de Michael Jackson est le plus vendu de l'histoire ?
questions.question_en: Which Michael Jackson album is the best-selling of all time?

questions.explanation_fr: Adele, sur l'album '21' (2011), Grammy Album of the Year.
questions.explanation_en: Adele, on the album '21' (2011), Grammy Album of the Year.

questions.question_fr: Le tube de Whitney Houston du film Bodyguard s'appelle 'I Will Always Love ___'.
questions.question_en: Whitney Houston's hit from The Bodyguard is 'I Will Always Love ___'.
questions.explanation_fr: Whitney Houston en 1992. À l'origine une chanson de Dolly Parton (1973).
questions.explanation_en: Whitney Houston in 1992. Originally a Dolly Parton song (1973).

questions.question_fr: Lady Gaga a remporté un Oscar pour la chanson 'Shallow' (A Star Is Born).
questions.question_en: Lady Gaga won an Oscar for the song 'Shallow' (A Star Is Born).
questions.explanation_fr: Oscar 2019 de la meilleure chanson originale, en duo avec Bradley Cooper.
questions.explanation_en: 2019 Oscar for Best Original Song, duet with Bradley Cooper.

questions.question_fr: Quelle pop star sud-coréenne a fait BLACKPINK ?
questions.question_en: Which K-pop star is part of BLACKPINK?
questions.explanation_fr: BLACKPINK est composé de Jisoo, Jennie, Rosé et Lisa.
questions.explanation_en: BLACKPINK is Jisoo, Jennie, Rosé, and Lisa.

questions.question_fr: Quelle artiste a explosé avec 'Driver's License' en 2021 ?
questions.question_en: Which artist exploded with 'Drivers License' in 2021?
questions.explanation_fr: Olivia Rodrigo, ancien Disney, a battu des records de streaming Spotify avec ce titre.
questions.explanation_en: Olivia Rodrigo, ex-Disney, broke Spotify streaming records with this song.

questions.question_fr: Madonna a sorti son premier album en ___.
questions.question_en: Madonna released her debut album in ___.
questions.explanation_fr: L'album 'Madonna' est sorti en juillet 1983, marquant le début de sa carrière.
questions.explanation_en: The album 'Madonna' was released in July 1983, starting her career.
